pages.text: The $(item)Mushroom Skyseed$() — dirt and both mushrooms. They sprout on a $(bold)Forest island's$() shady dark-oak or spruce floor.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

A mycelium isle crowned with huge mushrooms. Unlike on dirt, mushrooms stay put and spread on mycelium in any light, so it makes a tidy fungus farm. (It takes the biome it lands in, though — so it isn't mob-proof unless grown over mushroom fields.)
$(bold)Fungus$()$(br)Red and brown $(item)huge mushrooms$() give mushroom blocks and stems; small mushrooms dot the floor. Roll a red, brown, or mixed isle.
